name: ToolCallCard
description: AI tool-invocation card showing call + result.

api.name: ToolCallCard
api.description: AI tool-invocation card showing call + result.

examples.title: Status Variants
examples.code:
<ToolCallCard ToolName="search_web" Status="ToolCallCard.ToolCallStatus.Pending"
              Input="{"query": "latest Blazor news"}" />

<ToolCallCard ToolName="read_file" Status="ToolCallCard.ToolCallStatus.Running"
              Input="{"path": "/src/app.razor"}" />

<ToolCallCard ToolName="execute_code" Status="ToolCallCard.ToolCallStatus.Success"
              Input="{"language": "csharp"}" Output="Hello" DurationMs="342" />

<ToolCallCard ToolName="fetch_url" Status="ToolCallCard.ToolCallStatus.Error"
              ErrorMessage="Connection timeout after 5000ms" DurationMs="5001" />

examples.title: Expanded by Default
examples.code:
<ToolCallCard ToolName="analyze_sentiment"
              Status="ToolCallCard.ToolCallStatus.Success"
              Input="{"text": "Lumeo makes Blazor development a joy!"}"
              Output="{"sentiment": "positive", "score": 0.96}"
              DurationMs="128"
              DefaultOpen="true" />

examples.title: Status (interactive)
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_status">
    <SegmentedItem Value="@ToolCallCard.ToolCallStatus.Pending">Pending</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@ToolCallCard.ToolCallStatus.Running">Running</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@ToolCallCard.ToolCallStatus.Success">Success</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@ToolCallCard.ToolCallStatus.Error">Error</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>
<ToolCallCard ToolName="run_query" Status="@_status"
              Input="{"sql": "SELECT * FROM users"}"
              Output="@(_status == Success ? "10 rows" : null)"
              ErrorMessage="@(_status == Error ? "Timeout" : null)" />

@code { private ToolCallCard.ToolCallStatus _status = ToolCallCard.ToolCallStatus.Pending; }

examples.title: Multiple Tool Calls

mdSummary:
# ToolCallCard

AI tool-invocation card showing call + result.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** AI
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/tool-call-card

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ToolCallCard | ToolName | `string` | `string.Empty` |  |
| ToolCallCard | Status | `ToolCallStatus` | `ToolCallStatus.Pending` |  |
| ToolCallCard | Input | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToolCallCard | Output | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToolCallCard | ErrorMessage | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToolCallCard | DurationMs | `long?` | `` |  |
| ToolCallCard | DefaultOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| ToolCallCard | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToolCallCard | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<ToolCallCard />
```

## CSS variables
